# BlackjackGame Card

## Summary

The `BlackjackGame` card provides a complete Blackjack game experience within a Boxel card. Players can place bets, draw cards, and play against the dealer, with the game state and statistics tracked and persisted.

## Import

```gts
import { BlackjackGame } from './blackjack/blackjack';
```

## Usage as a Field

To use the `BlackjackGame` card as a field within a consuming card or field, you can add it as a `linksTo` field:

```gts
@field blackjackGame = linksTo(BlackjackGame);
```

This allows you to reference the Blackjack game instance from the consuming card.

## Template Usage

To display the `BlackjackGame` card in a template, you can use the `@fields.blackjackGame` helper to render the card's isolated format:

```hbs
<@fields.blackjackGame @format="isolated" />
```

This will render the full Blackjack game experience within the consuming card or field.
